headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWSA) And The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Media Stocks
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at News Corp (NASDAQ:NWSA) and its peers.
